**Best CSP:**

**Best Position Income CC:**
GOOGL - $360 strike, 2026-06-18, 58 DTE, $10.35/$10.75 bid/ask, 0.35 delta, 19.6% annualized return

**Best LEAPS:**
NVO - $20 strike, 2028-01-21, 640 DTE, $21.90/$22.45 bid/ask, 0.92 delta, 6.1% extrinsic (exceptional timing with 10% IVP near 52w low, but trend shows "WATCH - BASE FORMING")

**IVP Environment:**
Elevated volatility across growth names (NFLX 90%, GOOGL 91%) creating premium opportunities, while value plays like NVO at 10% IVP offer cheap LEAPS entry points.
